With a topographic prominence of 5247 ft it is the fifth-most prominent summit in Utah.
Rock Creek Station | Rock Creek Station was a stagecoach and Pony Express station in southeastern Nebraska, near the present-day village of Endicott.

Trout survival for winter is very poor with only the splake and brook trout overwintering. There is also a dense population of Utah chub.
